conditions.notes: Used as first dimension for 2D-LC. PEO block elutes in SEC mode.
conditions.evidence_text: The CAP of PS was realised in a DMF–THF mobile phase on a RP octadecyl column... (THF–DMF: 18–82)... all PS standards elute at more or less the same elution volume irrespective of their molar masses.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid chromatography at critical conditions (LCCC) / Critical Adsorption Point (CAP)
conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi, Pakistan

conditions.notes: Used as first dimension for 2D-LC. PS block elutes in SEC mode.
conditions.evidence_text: The CAP of PEO was realised on a normal phase Si column... At a mobile phase composition of 96–4 (THF–DMF, vol.%), all PEO standards elute at more or less the same elution volume and show no molar mass dependence.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Liquid chromatography at critical conditions (LCCC) / Critical Adsorption Point (CAP)
conditions.physical_address: H.E.J. Research Institute of Chemistry, International Centre for Chemical and Biological Sciences (ICCBS), University of Karachi, Karachi, Pakistan
